name: Mizoram PSC – Nursing Officer, Staff Nurse – 42 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 42 Nursing Officer, Staff Nurse Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 42 Nursing Officer, Staff Nurse. Candidates with GNM Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 08-05-2026, and closes on 12-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Mizoram PSC website, mpsc.mizoram.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Health & Family Welfare Department / Home (Prisons) Department, Govt. of Mizoram

age_limit.age_details: As per Government of Mizoram rules

salary_details.pay_scale: Level 7 of the Pay Matrix (7th CPC)

selection_process: Written Examination + Document Verification + Mizo Language Proficiency Test (wherever applicable)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the Mizoram Public Service Commission online portal (https://mpsconline.mizoram.gov.in/). No other mode of application will be accepted. The online portal is active from 08-05-2026 to 12-06-2026 (up to 4:00 PM). New users must complete one-time registration before 12-06-2026 (4:00 PM).
seo_tags: Mizoram Public Service Commission Nursing Officer
